reason: Hard rules to verify: no raw hex in component code, library whitelist enforced, tool-call rendering goes through toolUI registry, destructive actions use shadcn AlertDialog.
Verify new tokens (brand-deep / brand-light / success / warning / error / info) follow HSL channel format, light theme oceanization preserves WCAG AA contrast, no raw hex slipped into globals.css.
Verify new MagicUI/Tremor/AgentThoughtChain components follow existing patterns (MessageBubble + toolUI registration). No mega-component branching by skill.

Confirm @xyflow/react is treated as react-flow rename (not a new lib). Tremor Raw chart additions either land with spec amendment OR are wrappers around recharts only. Imports are named (no wildcard).
Verify view hierarchy preserved — chat / assets / scans / reports tabs still functional, no regression to assistant-ui chat surface.
If R6 AgentThoughtChain introduces new event types, verify wire-format alignment with documented protocol; thought-part rendering must not break existing skill renderers.
General quality bar — error handling, logging conventions, test coverage standards. New code lands; ensure baseline holds.
Verify SecbotThread.tsx uses correct v0.10 API (ThreadPrimitive.Root + MessagePrimitive.Content components.tools.by_name). 6 skill renderers zero-regression check.
Verify Recipe B was followed — bundle delta within ~80-110 KB gzip target, prefers-reduced-motion handled, framer-motion AnimatePresence does not fight assistant-ui auto-scroll.
